fields.title: Add tab shortcut to cycle tau prompt modes
fields.description: Register a tab keyboard shortcut in PromptModes service to cycle smart -> deep -> rush with guards to avoid accidental switching while typing.
fields.notes: Added registerShortcut('tab') in PromptModes service to cycle smart->deep->rush. Shortcut only fires when UI is present, session is idle with no pending messages, and editor text is empty. Added tests for shortcut cycling + guard behavior and updated existing prompt mode setup mocks.
fields.close_reason: Implemented tab mode-cycle shortcut with safety guards and test coverage; gate passes.
